case_title: WELLS, LAURA J. vs. CHADWICK MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS, LAURA J. AS TO DEFENDANT CHADWICK MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. PETERSON, RICHARD, INDV. DBA CHADWICK COFFEE & TEA
